  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "cant play because servers are shut down"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "They deadass took the servers down. You can't even play MyCareer anymore"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "That was the whole reason I got the game and I could barely even play it"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "THEY DEADASS TOOK THE ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ SERVERS DOWN AFTER 3 YEARS"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "now u are not even able to play mycarrer"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "really p2w and as a f2p it is hard"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "as a f2p it is hard"}, {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fun with friends"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "900 hours of driving, I must say it is good"}, {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Combined with mods, it is perfect"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Relaxing game"}, {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "nice map"}, {"aspect": "dlc", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "many dlc's"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "trucks,city's and much more"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Really worth getting"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "if you like long drives"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "genre comparison", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "just a meme game from the worn-out era of QWOP-Likes, and there are far better meme games to pick from"}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "controls", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I don't think the controls worked properly when I last played it"}]},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "physics", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "sending my entire body into the enemy team"}, {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "swinging a big hammer and sending my entire body into the enemy team"}, {"aspect": "character ability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a cat who can carry a solid 100kg of drunk german man"}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": []}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "will keep me occupied until Eu4"}]},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "RNG events", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I love RNG events that 100% kill your heir and ruin your run"}]},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "I keep coming back to this game"}, {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Endless replayability"}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": [{"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "A world of possibilities in your PC. Colonize, conquer, trade whatever you like on world map"}, {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Highly addictive"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Runs even on potato"}]},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [{"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "But how much will it cost you? Everything"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "over the years of constant expansions and updates"}]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "So much content..."}, {"aspect": "stash tabs", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Stash Tabs are a game changer and great aesthetically + they carry over to POE2"}]},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": [{"aspect": "servers_netcode", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "getting kicked for connectivity issues"}]},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [{"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "cheap"}, {"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "under 1 GB"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "low PC requirements"}]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [{"aspect": "realism", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "True simulator of border chekpoint in cold war"}, {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Has some moral choices to do"}, {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "even looking humble"}]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Fun game"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "should be acquired during discount"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "customization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Can't play as sweden"}, {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "can't even install a mod for it because the mod is not available anymore"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "This game is fun"}, {"aspect": "player_choice", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "allows you to run your country the way you want to run it"}]}
]

[
  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 2, "aspects": [{"aspect": "relaxation", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "stressful game. has its good and bad moments. really have to be in the mood though or its just annoying."}]},
  {"idx": 3, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 4, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "this game is a addiction it ruins ur sleep once u play youll never wanna go to work /schoool it will ruin ur life"}]},
  {"idx": 5, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "impossible to put down — I've sunk hundreds of hours into it and still find myself coming back"},
    {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The gameplay itself is genuinely brilliant: simple enough to pick up in minutes, but the ceiling on skill is basically infinite"},
    {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "hard to ignore what Epic did to this game — removing trading, gutting the progression system, and turning what used to be a thriving community into a cash-grab storefront was a gut punch"},
    {"aspect": "progression", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "gutting the progression system"},
    {"aspect": "monetization", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "cash-grab storefront"},
    {"aspect": "community", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The toxicity in lobbies is real too"},
    {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the core game is still one of the best ever made, and I'd recommend it to anyone who wants a competitive experience unlike anything else"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 6, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 7, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 8, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "a decade of unmatched excitement that never ends"}]},
  {"idx": 9, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 10, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Addiction is this game. I have never been the same."}]},
  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "having all kinds of mods on this game makes it ten times better"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "crashing, freezing that continued AFTER I seemingly closed the game"},
    {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "horrible lag"},
    {"aspect": "bugs", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "constant pop up errors"},
    {"aspect": "mods", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the game outright REFUSING to load maps or turn on/off mods"},
    {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 of cash down the drain"},
    {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "$32 more expensive than it should be"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [
    {"aspect": "build_variety", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you can play the game multiple different ways (Merc, Trader, Vassel, Ruler) and its completely open as to how you want your character to play out"},
    {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "The world, for the most part, moves pretty consistantly and things constantly change, kingdoms lose towns and castles and armies declare war on you out of the blue."},
    {"aspect": "combat", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Battles can be fun and do require some thinking, especially if you find yourself outnumbered."},
    {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Seiges are a great feature, you just lack the ability to control them well."},
    {"aspect": "writing", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Dialouges are rough and uninteresting, every NPC interaction is identical and repetitive."},
    {"aspect": "ai_behavior", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "AI lords and leaders are terrible when it comes to tactics, both in seiges and in battles."},
    {"aspect": "graphics", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Graphics are very poor."},
    {"aspect": "world", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "There is so much potential in the towns and villages if they were more interactive."},
    {"aspect": "level_design", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Hideouts are bland and monotonous."},
    {"aspect": "replayability", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "I would recommend simply for the joy of the first playthrough, after that the cracks in the game start to spoil the overall enjoyment."},
    {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Buy on discount"}
  ]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is fun and addicting"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": []}
]

  {"idx": 0, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 1, "aspects": [{"aspect": "art_style", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "the art in the game is fire!"}]},

  {"idx": 4, "aspects": []},

  {"idx": 11, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "mixed", "evidence": "Fun! And Rage-Inducing! But mostly fun!"}]},
  {"idx": 12, "aspects": [{"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "expert makes it impeccably harder"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "requires time effort and practice to master the mechanics"}, {"aspect": "grind", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "grind and complete certain achievements/challenges"}]},
  {"idx": 13, "aspects": []},
  {"idx": 14, "aspects": [{"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "good fun game!"}]},
  {"idx": 15, "aspects": [{"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "plenty to offer - procedurally generated planets ... base building, freighters and expeditions, and settlement management"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "a mile wide and an inch deep"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "an exercise in tedium and repetition"}, {"aspect": "difficulty", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I was never challenged"}, {"aspect": "atmosphere", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "I never felt a sense of danger"}, {"aspect": "grind", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "incredible grind"}, {"aspect": "multiplayer", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "The multiplayer aspects of this game are totally unnecessary"}, {"aspect": "ui", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "the UI is genuinely one of the worst user interfaces I've ever used"}, {"aspect": "customization", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "it has customisation to your exosuit or ship or your tools"}]},
  {"idx": 16, "aspects": [{"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Infinite loading screen"}, {"aspect": "platform_access", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "on vr"}, {"aspect": "performance", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "Please only play with a NASA computer"}]},
  {"idx": 17, "aspects": [{"aspect": "game_length", "sentiment": "neutral", "evidence": "my main save has over 250hrs"}, {"aspect": "price_value", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "this game is worth every dollar"}, {"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "for 10 years they been tossing out free updates"}, {"aspect": "developer_conduct", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "you guys already redeemed yourselves"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "do the new swarm expedition"}]},
  {"idx": 18, "aspects": [{"aspect": "updates", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "fun now after all the updates"}, {"aspect": "stability", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "It was really bad on launch"}, {"aspect": "gameplay", "sentiment": "negative", "evidence": "how boring it used to be"}, {"aspect": "content_amount", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "Lots of stuff to do now"}]},
  {"idx": 19, "aspects": [{"aspect": "addictiveness", "sentiment": "positive", "evidence": "take 5 hours from my day in the blink of an eye"}]}
]
